zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Parkyng於1478年出生在英國可瓦爾聖 斯蒂芬時，她的父親William Paryking22歲，母親Mrs William Paryking19歲。她於1494年與Richard Porter在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 斯蒂芬結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1538年在她的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Parkyng于1478年出生在英国可瓦爾聖 斯蒂芬时，她的父亲William Paryking22岁，母亲Mrs William Paryking19岁。她于1494年与Richard Porter在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 斯蒂芬结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1538年在她的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Parkyng
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Parkin
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Perkin, Parkin, a pet form of Peres ‘Peter’ (see Pierce ) with the diminutive suffix -kin. (The change from -er- to -ar- was a characteristic phonetic development in Middle English.)

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Parkyng was born in 1478, in St Stephen, Cornwall, England, her father, William Paryking, was 22 and her mother, Mrs William Paryking, was 19. She married Richard Porter in 1494, in St Stephen, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died about 1538, in her hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Parkyng est née en 1478, à St Stephen, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, William Paryking, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mrs William Paryking, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Porter en 1494, à St Stephen, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1538, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Parkyng 1478 in St Stephen, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Paryking 22 und ihre Mutter Mrs William Paryking 19. Sie hat 1494 in St Stephen, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Richard Porter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb um 1538 im Alter von 61 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Cornwall, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Parkyngが1478年にイギリスコルンワルスト ステフンで生まれた時，父William Parykingは22歳，母Mrs William Parykingは19歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト ステフンでRichard Porterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1538年に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Parkyng(이)가 1478년 영국 코른월 스트 스티븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Paryking(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs William Paryking(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 스티븐에서 Richard Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1538년 그녀의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Parkyng родилась в 1478 г. в местности ст стифен, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени William Paryking было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs William Paryking, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Porter в 1494 г. в местности ст стифен, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла около 1538 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности корнвалл, Англия.
